events.pageTitle: Who Will Win the World Cup?
events.metaDescription: Winning probabilities for each team in the FIFA World Cup 2026, updated daily from prediction market data.
events.aboutText: This dashboard tracks winning probabilities for each team in the FIFA World Cup 2026, updated daily from prediction market data.
